arcGoal: Alex seeks to prove his worth despite the public humiliation he faces.
arcConflict: Alex is publicly humiliated by a powerful student, leading him to question his place in the academy and his own abilities.
emotionalShift: From despair and self-doubt, Alex finds a small spark of determination.

arcGoal: Alex builds alliances to support his rise in the academy's hierarchy.
arcConflict: Alex must navigate the treacherous politics of the academy, facing betrayal and skepticism from potential allies.
emotionalShift: Alex learns trust is hard-earned but essential, building a network of loyal friends.

arcGoal: Alex seeks to improve his magical abilities and prove himself to the academy’s powerful figures.
arcConflict: Despite his efforts, Alex struggles with mastering magic, facing doubts from peers and teachers alike.
emotionalShift: Alex discovers hidden potential within himself and becomes determined to unlock it, gaining confidence in his own abilities.

arcGoal: Alex confronts the student who humiliated him and seeks redemption for all he has endured.
arcConflict: In a dramatic confrontation, Alex must use everything he’s learned to rise above his past and claim his rightful place in the academy.
emotionalShift: From pain and anger, Alex transforms into a confident and respected leader, ready to face any future challenges head-on.
